name: AI Readiness Audit
tagline: Where AI saves you the most. Ranked, scored, scoped.
deliverables: Top 10 AI workflows ranked by ROI
ideal: Cashflowing SMBs ready to put AI to work without hiring an engineer.

name: AI Workflow Build
tagline: One end-to-end AI workflow, shipped. Fixed price, fixed timeline.
deliverables: Source code or n8n flows handed over
15% revshare on net new revenue (24 months, capped at $50k)
ideal: Operators who completed the Audit and know exactly what to build.

name: Fractional AI Engineer
tagline: Anchor on retainer. Pause any week.
ideal: Businesses that need AI work continuously, not one-off projects.
